# @univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer)
[![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer?style=flat-square)](https://npmjs.com/package/@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer)

`@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer` provides edit history viewer UI for Univer Pro.

## Package Overview

| Package | UMD global | CSS | Locales | Facade entry |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| `@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer` | `UniverProEditHistoryViewer` | Yes | Yes | No |

## Installation

```sh
pnpm add @univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer
# or
npm install @univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer
```

Keep all `@univerjs/*` and `@univerjs-pro/*` packages on the same version.

## Usage

```ts
import '@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer/lib/index.css';
import EnUS from '@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer/locale/en-US';
import { UniverEditHistoryViewerPlugin } from '@univerjs-pro/edit-history-viewer';

univer.registerPlugin(UniverEditHistoryViewerPlugin);

// Merge EnUS into your Univer locale map when this package contributes UI text.
```

Exported plugin classes:

- `UniverEditHistoryViewerPlugin`
- `UniverEditHistoryViewerMobilePlugin`
